name: Ruthless
official_rules_text: When an allied m Trooper unit with a faceup Order token starts its Activation within 2 and in LOS of a unit with the Ruthless keyword, that allied unit may suffer 1 Wound to make 1 free action.
description: When an allied m Trooper unit with a faceup Order token starts its Activation within 2 and in LOS of a unit with the Ruthless keyword, that allied unit may suffer 1 Wound to make 1 free action.
